Off Calendar Oct-25-2002 Off Calendar

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2002 Text Ruling

Default Prove-Up In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On September 23,2002.
Off Calendar Sep-23-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia Dowling. Douglas Holloway, Esq. appeared for the plaintiff. The Court entered default against Intelligent Media, Inc., Ronnie A. Margolis and Zeke Margolis. The Court signs judgment as follows: Principal: $35,595.59; Interest: $1,179.75; Attorney Fees: $3,500.00; Costs: $296.00 for a total judgment of $40,571.34. The Court also awards possession of the property to the plaintiff. Judgment signed in open court.
